sitemap.message: Live sitemap.xml was not observed at the conventional URL (HTTP 404).

deployment.message: Local expected crawl files exist, but only one corresponding live resource appears present.

verdict.summary: The local crawl-file changes appear only partially visible on the live site.

limitations: Recheck reads public evidence only; it does not deploy or call hosting provider APIs.
Visible crawl files do not guarantee crawling, indexing, propagation, or third-party behavior.
Local expected paths are inferred only from the current V1-safe framework conventions.
nextActions: Review deployment and hosting configuration for the missing or invalid live resource, then run recheck again.
